sentence: Rectumultuous thoughts have no business following you into the gazebro.

wombos.definition: A gazebo that belongs to or is occupied by bros — an outdoor bro hangout structure. The bro-coded version of a gazebo. Part of the extended brarpet household.
The chaotic, cringe-laden feeling triggered by a sudden, unwanted memory of something embarrassing from your past — the kind of recall that makes you want to spiral or crash out.
